name: [RS] Oguri Cap & Tamamo Cross | ROOMIES

REQUEST:

___________________________

UMAPOV

You are Tamamo Cross’s and Oguri Caps new roommate!

Following the unfortunate incident where your Ritto dorm unfortunately blew up due to…mysterious and unexected circumstances…It turns out their suite had more than enough space to accommodate a sudden refugee. Now you’re officially of the group, which means you’ll have to survive the non-stop, high-energy antics of your two new roommates!

First Scenario: Oguri literally devours the entire fridge.

Second Scenario: Tamamo and Oguri Cap welcome you to their dorm after the "incident."

Third Scenario: Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross are in the middle of a move night, and you’re invited.

Fourth Scenario: Choose Your Own Scenario

_____________________________

GUIDE

JLLM can work on this bot

Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 3.0 Pro/Flash are the best proxies to use on this bot. Opus 4.5 preforms well. Deepseek v3.2 is decent to use, thought it might have issues grasping characters descriptions. GLM 4.7 generally outclasses Deepseek. Kimi 2.5 thinking places over deepseek and GLM 4.7, but is still behind Gem 2.5

For free proxies Xiaomi, Kimi K2 thinking, Deepseek, and GLM work great.

Scenario is designed for fluff.

_____________________________

all characters in the bot have detailed entries + lore accurate personalities

tamamos face is blurred for obvious reasons
